summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest tests PASS (auth, profiles, access control, logs, stats, vaccinations, adult checkups, NVIDIA NIM AI for parent + teen privacy). Frontend: login flow appears broken — clicking the 'Log in' button on /login does NOT trigger any /api/auth/login network call and the page stays on /login for both parent@demo.com and adult@demo.com. Because login never succeeds from the UI, all downstream frontend flows (parent dashboard with Aarav/Diya, stage badges, sick-often alert, child detail, puberty toggle, child view, parent AI Q&A, adult dashboard, adult AI Q&A) could not be exercised end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking the 'Log in' submit button does not fire the /api/auth/login request nor redirect to /parent or /adult dashboard. Form sits on /login with no error shown. Reproduced twice with valid seeded creds (parent@demo.com/demo1234 and adult@demo.com/demo1234). Submit button likely missing type='submit' inside <form>, missing onClick/onSubmit handler, or data-testid='login-submit' not wired to the submit action.
Email/Password inputs lack accessible <label htmlFor=...> association (get_by_label times out) and appear to not have data-testid='login-email' / 'login-password' on the input itself.

integration_issues.issue: No /api/auth/login request is observed when Log in button is clicked; frontend auth submit path broken.

action_items: Fix Login page submit: ensure <form onSubmit={handleLogin}> wraps inputs AND the Log in <button type='submit'> (or attach onClick={handleLogin} to the button). Verify handleLogin calls axios.post(`${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/auth/login`, {...}), stores token, and navigate('/parent' or '/adult').
Add data-testid='login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit' directly on the respective input/button elements so automated tests can target them.

After the login fix, re-run frontend E2E for: parent dashboard (Aarav child badge + Diya puberty_teen badge + 'sick often' alert), child-card-* click → /parent/child/:id, toggle-puberty-btn, open-child-view-btn (kid UI for Aarav, teen UI for Diya), parent-ai-* submit returns answer + ai-medical-disclaimer, adult login → adult-ai-* + checkups list.
Consider the same audit for Signup page submit button wiring.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 508-line file; acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/profiles.py, routers/ai.py as it grows past ~700.
JWT_SECRET default value hardcoded in .env is labelled 'change_me_in_production' — OK for MVP but flag for deploy hardening.
seed_if_empty uses date.today().replace(year=year-14) which crashes on Feb 29 leap-year DOBs (non-issue today but brittle).
ai_history endpoint exists but teen queries are intentionally dropped — verified working.
test_credentials: parent@demo.com / demo1234 (parent), adult@demo.com / demo1234 (individual). Both verified working via direct /api/auth/login POST.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing auto-seed (Aarav age 9 child, Diya age 14 puberty_teen, Priya 27 adult). Seed verified via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green (17/17). Focus next iteration on the Login.jsx submit wiring — verify that clicking the Log in button actually POSTs to /api/auth/login. Use browser DevTools Network tab to confirm. Once login works, the full frontend flow should be re-run as described in action_items. AI endpoints work and take ~5-12s to return; use waits of 15s+ for AI assertions.
rca of the issue: Login button click produces no network request to /api/auth/login. Most likely cause: in Login.jsx the submit button either (a) is not inside a <form> with onSubmit, (b) is missing type='submit', or (c) has an onClick that throws before the fetch. Since backend /api/auth/login works perfectly via curl/pytest, the bug is isolated to the frontend submit handler.
